title: Yuns Cuisine
description: A tiny Mod that adds 1-2 Food Items
body:
# _Yuns Cuisine_
A light mod that expands on Minecraft's cooking and farming side.

## _Additions_
This mod expands on food items that Mojang could've added without bringing "annoying" cooking mechanics or features that clutter up the game flow.

Yuns Cuisine also expands on the farming part of Minecraft, adding in 14 new crops and 2 new berry bush variations.

## _FAQ_

Q: Do I have permission to use this in a Modpack?
A: Yes, you have the Permission to use it in Modpacks.

Q: Will it have compatibility with Farmer's Delight?
A: Maybe, but if someone want to bridge the two mods, go ahead - currently it isn't a priority as far as development goes.

Q: Will Yuns Cuisine be updated to X version?
A: Yes, though it might take time as this is a hobby project.

Q: Why are some recipes disabled in some versions?
A: There were no clear plans with the items before thats why they were disabled/missing. Just use any version past 1.4.5 and you will have access them

Q: Why was some stuff removed/changed in some Versions?
A: Items that got removed moved to a different Mod. Items that got changed were changed to make it either easier or more logical to obtain or not overload certain Parts of the Game.

Q: Will it get back ported to X version?
A: Sadly not. Unless there is demand for it.

Q: Will you make a Forge version?
A: No. I do not want to leave Fabric.



### _Notice_

So some Items did not have their crafting recipes (1.2.3 to 1.4.5). 

Check out my other Mods

https://modrinth.com/mod/origins-unedibles

https://modrinth.com/mod/builders-shop
